## 1. Executive Summary
The primary focus of current operations is the certificate renewal process (Expires 4/5), which is currently stagnant. Despite two follow-up attempts initiated on 03-25, no progress has been recorded.

## 2. Pending & Risks
- **Certificate Renewal (Expires 4/5):** This item remains pending due to a lack of communication from the external stakeholder. There is a critical risk of service interruption if the renewal is not finalized before the April 5th deadline.

## 3. Management Gap
- **Communication Bottleneck:** David Kim (External) has not responded to two consecutive follow-up requests from Minjun Lee (Internal). This external non-responsiveness creates a management void, as there is currently no alternative path identified to secure the necessary credentials before expiration.

## 4. Strategic Insights
- **Escalation Protocol:** The current dependency on a single external contact for time-sensitive security renewals represents a single point of failure. Implementing a formal escalation procedure for unresponsive external partners is required to mitigate operational risks associated with expiring infrastructure components.
